title: Pulmonary Medicine
subtitle: Expert diagnosis and treatment of lung and respiratory diseases
approachText: Our pulmonary specialists provide comprehensive outpatient evaluation and management of pulmonary and respiratory diseases. We combine advanced diagnostics with evidence-based treatment plans tailored to each patient.

conditions.title: Asthma
conditions.description: Comprehensive asthma management and control strategies.

conditions.title: COPD & Emphysema
conditions.description: Specialized care for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.

conditions.title: Interstitial Lung Disease
conditions.description: Management of diffuse parenchymal lung diseases.

conditions.title: Pulmonary Fibrosis
conditions.description: Expert care for progressive fibrotic lung diseases.

conditions.title: Sarcoidosis
conditions.description: Diagnosis and treatment of this inflammatory condition.

conditions.title: Chronic Cough
conditions.description: Thorough evaluation and management of persistent cough.

conditions.title: Pulmonary Nodule Evaluation
conditions.description: Assessment and management of lung nodules.

conditions.title: Pleural Effusion
conditions.description: Diagnosis and treatment of fluid around the lungs.

diagnosticServices.title: Pulmonary Function Testing (PFTs)
diagnosticServices.description: Comprehensive assessment of lung capacity and function.

diagnosticServices.title: Bronchoscopy
diagnosticServices.description: Direct visualization of airways for diagnosis.

diagnosticServices.title: CT-Guided Lung Biopsy Referral
diagnosticServices.description: Precise tissue sampling for definitive diagnosis.

diagnosticServices.title: Cardiopulmonary Exercise Testing
diagnosticServices.description: Assessment of exercise tolerance and limitation.

ctaText: Contact us today to learn more about our pulmonary services and schedule your consultation.
